2604.07147.title: Dynamic Context Evolution for Scalable Synthetic Data Generation
2604.07147.paper_summary: Large language models produce repetitive output when prompted independently across many batches, a phenomenon we term cross-batch mode collapse: the progressive loss of output diversity when a language model is prompted repeatedly without access to its prior generations. Practitioners have long mitigated this with ad hoc deduplication and seed rotation, but no principled framework exists. We introduce Dynamic Context Evolution (DCE), comprising three mechanisms: (1) verbalized tail sampling (the model labels each idea with a guess about how obvious it is, and obvious ideas are discarded), which filters high-probability candidates via model self-assessment; (2) semantic memory, which maintains a persistent embedding index to reject near-duplicates across batches; and (3) adaptive prompt evolution, which reconstructs the generation prompt each batch using memory state and rotating diversity strategies. In experiments across three domains (sustainable packaging concepts, educational exam questions, and creative writing prompts) and two model families (gpt-5-mini and claude-haiku-4-5), a component ablation across 2-3 random seeds per method shows that DCE achieves 0.0 +/- 0.0% collapse versus 5.6 +/- 2.0% for naive prompting, while producing 17-18 HDBSCAN clusters per seed versus naive's volatile 2-17, indicating reliably richer conceptual structure. These results are validated with an independent embedding model (all-MiniLM-L6-v2) and hold across sensitivity sweeps of the VTS threshold tau and dedup threshold delta. Deduplication and prompt evolution are individually insufficient but jointly effective, at approximately $0.50 per 1,000 candidates using only standard API calls, with no fine-tuning or custom architectures required.
2604.07147.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型在許多批次中獨立提示時會產生重複的輸出，這種現象我們稱之為跨批次模式崩潰：當語言模型在沒有訪問其先前生成內容的情況下反覆提示時，輸出多樣性逐漸喪失。從業者長期以來一直通過臨時的去重和種子輪換來減輕這一問題，但尚未存在任何原則性框架。我們提出了動態上下文演化（DCE），包括三個機制：（1）口頭化尾部抽樣（模型為每個想法標記一個關於其明顯程度的猜測，明顯的想法會被丟棄），通過模型自我評估過濾高概率候選者；（2）語義記憶，保持持久的嵌入索引以拒絕跨批次的近似重複；以及（3）自適應提示演化，利用記憶狀態和輪換多樣性策略在每個批次中重建生成提示。在三個領域（可持續包裝概念、教育考試問題和創意寫作提示）和兩個模型系列（gpt-5-mini和claude-haiku-4-5）的實驗中，對每種方法進行2-3個隨機種子的組件消融顯示，DCE實現了0.0 +/- 0.0%的崩潰，而天真的提示為5.6 +/- 2.0%；同時每個種子產生17-18個HDBSCAN聚類，而天真的方法則波動在2-17之間，顯示出更可靠的概念結構。這些結果通過獨立的嵌入模型（all-MiniLM-L6-v2）進行驗證，並在VTS閾值tau和去重閾值delta的敏感性掃描中保持一致。去重和提示演化單獨不足，但聯合起來是有效的，使用僅標準API調用的情況下，每1,000個候選者的成本約為$0.50，且不需要微調或自定義架構。
2604.07147.author: Ryan Lingo et.al.
